data.title: New contracts fuel GXO ecommerce revenue 21% in Q1
data.description: Ecommerce customers are increasingly tapping GXO for bonded warehousing, rebagging, retagging, and reverse logistics to mitigate supply chain risks.

data.title: Shopify’s B2B ecommerce sales surge 109% in Q1
data.description: The software and ecommerce platform provider's B2B momentum is backed by its expanding feature set and merchant wins.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: One omnichannel feature saw elevated retailer adoption last year
data.description: While some omnichannel features lost participants among retail chains in 2024, one managed to make subtle gains.

data.title: AB InBev B2B digital sales surge in Q1
data.description: In the first quarter, the BEES marketplace processed 10 million orders, a 27% increase from the same period last year.

data.title: Shopify launches an AI tool ecommerce platform update
data.description: The latest update brings enhanced reasoning capabilities, enabling Sidekick to analyze multiple data sources at once and offer strategic recommendation.
